Title: Rizzo, Giulio Emanuele
Overview: Italian archaeologist. Rizzo published a pamphlet in 1939, Maniere "corrette" e metodi corrotti di Bernardo Ashmole, which Ashmole replied to in the Journal of Hellenic Studies the same year.
Selected Bibliography: Maniere "corrette" e metodi corrotti di Bernardo Ashmole. Rome: privately printed, 1939;
